title: EVEN SIMPLER - barebones overlay
description: This pack makes barebones simpler and can improve framerate
body:
This texture pack is a add on for barebones that makes it even less detailed, this can improve framerate, look nice , and works with sodium. This texture pack is not finished but it is posted early so you can start to experiance this. This project takes insporation from barebones and f8thfull (despite not being entirely 8-bit).

To apply this pack you need to download EVEN SIMPLER - barebones overlay.zip, then go to %appdata%, from there go to .mincraft folder and scroll down to resourse packs, upload the file there and then your done. 

If you find any bugs / missing textures contact me in my discord.
